heading: Death gratuity payments as gifts
label: 4506 Death gratuity payments as gifts
text: Any death gratuity payment at any time specifically appropriated by any Act of Congress or at any time made out of the applicable accounts of the House of Representatives or the contingent fund of the Senate shall be held to have been a gift.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified identically to sections 38b and 125a of this title. Section 38b was omitted from the Code and section 125a was editorially reclassified and renumbered as this section.
Amendments1996— substituted “applicable accounts of the House of Representatives or the contingent fund” for “contingent fund of the House of Representatives or”.Pub. L. 104–186
amendments: Amendments1996— substituted “applicable accounts of the House of Representatives or the contingent fund” for “contingent fund of the House of Representatives or”.Pub. L. 104–186
